channel.title: Developers on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Developers on Tech Tracker

item.title: Pling - A platform for creators and publishers to earn money.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-NY771tvVsek/Yk3P4oeyP_I/AAAAAAAAKCs/4NEuQgVJAcocFeLA1439YTIKDDrYmtiSwCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1649266655654129-0.png" alt=""> Most developers upload and submit their apps either on Play Store or App Store to get recognition and attention from people, but these app marketplaces don’t pay for downloads including that they charge alot of commission and tax on paid apps so to earn money developers add in-app ads on apps and provide external paid services. While, some developers who don’t want to give commission provide paid apps on thier official website or app like Fortnite, but there are few developers who upload thier apps on such file sharing platforms which pays for downloads to earn money however majority of file sharing platforms are not specifically created for developers.

item.title: WEX - India's Biggest Mobile Battle Royale On Android |
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-S6n5vvuL8Ic/YF4cIbuMOeI/AAAAAAAAD2A/fy9fqFrYupk5nXVMGU3ylB5kUo0PAjNpACLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1616780305377981-0.png" alt="WEX - India&rsquo;s Biggest Mobile Battle Royale On Android |" title="WEX - India's Biggest Mobile Battle Royale On Android |"> New battle royale games are on rage these days in india, every new week one new bat- tle royale game can be seen as Pub-G was banned and atma Nirbhar Bharat Program is inspiring and motivating many talented young developers to make amazing world class apps and games that can compete with global companies.

item.title: SICO™ - A new battle royale game from indian developers on Android!
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-p9qTWsSDeig/YE93Jv_5SCI/AAAAAAAADio/wx0XF8nApb09wOnaMvn3oa0ltWpXbIsyACLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1615820576073020-0.png" alt="SICO™ - A new battle royale game from indian developers on Android!" title="SICO™ - A new battle royale game from indian developers on Android!"> New battle royale games are on rage these days in india, every new week one new bat- tle royale game can be seen as Pub-G was banned and atma Nirbhar Bharat Program is inspiring and motivating many talented young developers to make amazing world class apps and games that can compete with global companies.
